infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DohPayDaTT uses the camera so you can take a photo of the product price tag when submitting a price report.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DohPayDaTT lets you attach a photo from your gallery to your price report to help the community verify prices.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: DohPayDaTT saves captured product photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DohPayDaTT uses your location to show nearby stores and traffic conditions in your region.

plugins.photosPermission: DohPayDaTT lets you attach a photo from your gallery to a price report.
plugins.cameraPermission: DohPayDaTT uses the camera to photograph product price tags.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: DohPayDaTT uses your location to show nearby stores.
